topic: European news on politicians/public figures and social media controversies (April 8-15, 2026)
editorial_overview: No relevant news articles from European sources published in the last week were found matching the specified topics of politicians deleting social media posts, controversial statements, content removal orders, censorship, or platform moderation controversies involving political figures. The available search results reference a US-centric story about Donald Trump deleting a social media post, reported by a New Zealand outlet citing Reuters, but lack any European publications or focus. This absence may indicate limited coverage or no major incidents in Europe during this period.
